name: Flexi Dragon
shortDescription: A tiny dragon that bends, twists, and comes alive in your hands.
description: Our signature articulated dragon, printed in one piece with fully poseable joints. Satisfying to fidget with, gorgeous on a shelf. Each scale is modeled for a premium, tactile finish.

name: Flexi Caterpillar
shortDescription: These little wiggly buddies are super fun to fidget with!
description: A wiggly, segmented caterpillar that flows through your fingers. The perfect desk companion and an instant crowd-pleaser for all ages.

name: F1 Race Car
shortDescription: Bring the thrill of the racetrack to your everyday life.
description: A detailed open-wheel race car from our F1 Collection. Rolling wheels, sculpted aero, and a display-ready stance. Built for collectors and motorsport fans.

name: Hogwarts Castle
description: A grand, highly-detailed castle centerpiece. Towers, turrets and tiny windows printed at high resolution — a showstopping collectible and gift.

name: Articulated Octopus
shortDescription: Eight wiggly arms of pure fidget joy.
description: A fully articulated octopus with eight independently flowing arms. Mesmerizing motion and a beautiful silhouette on any desk.

name: Mini Mech Robot
shortDescription: A poseable desk guardian with attitude.
description: A chunky little mech with poseable arms and legs. Stands guard over your keyboard and looks fantastic in a collection lineup.

name: Crystal Dragon Egg
shortDescription: A faceted egg that glows in the light.
description: A geometric dragon egg with crystalline facets. Pairs perfectly with the Flexi Dragon as a gift set.

name: Chess Knight — Sculpted
shortDescription: A bold, modern take on the classic knight.
description: A sculptural chess knight, printed with crisp detail. Sold individually — collect the full set over time.

name: Desk City Skyline
shortDescription: A tiny isometric city for your desk.
description: A miniature voxel-style city block inspired by the TOYING IDEA world. A playful paperweight and conversation starter.

name: Flexi Shark
description: A snappy articulated shark with a poseable jaw. Glides across your desk and bites back (gently).

name: Custom Nameplate
shortDescription: Your name, your colors, your desk.
description: A personalized 3D nameplate. Choose your text, font weight and colors — a perfect customized gift.

name: Tiny Castle Keychain
shortDescription: Carry a castle wherever you go.
description: A pocket-sized castle keychain — the little sibling of our flagship castle. Great as a party favor or stocking filler.
